meta.title: RideShift RVA
meta.description: Move green, save green. Earn local rewards for car-free commuting in Richmond, VA.

footer.tagline: Cities thrive when people move through them intentionally. Our platform connects eco-conscious commuters with local businesses — turning every bus ride, bike share, and carpool into a stepping stone toward exclusive weekly rewards.

hero.title: Move Green.
hero.subtitle: Mix your commute. Unlock local deals.
hero.description: RideShift RVA connects Richmonders with weekly discounts from local businesses — just for choosing the bus, a bike, or your own two feet.

problem.title: The Problem
problem.description: Too many Richmond commutes start and end in a single car. Traffic builds. Emissions rise. And our roads — already under constant construction — take the hit.
problem.systemicContext: These numbers reflect decades of car-centric infrastructure: abundant free parking downtown, gaps in GRTC bus coverage — especially cross-town routes — streets designed for speed rather than safety, and limited protected bike infrastructure. RideShift doesn't pretend to fix all of this. But by rewarding the Richmonders who choose alternatives despite these barriers, we shift demand signals and prove the appetite for multimodal transit exists.

solution.title: The Solution
solution.description: RideShift makes multimodal transit worth it. Set a weekly goal, confirm you met it, and redeem real deals at local businesses enrolled in the program — lower emissions and real savings at participating spots. Simple.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1Description: Take the bus, bike, scooter, walk, or combine modes — then set your weekly goal in the app
howItWorks.step2Description: Get a Sunday check-in email and confirm you met your goal with one click
howItWorks.step3Description: Unlock weekly deals at participating Richmond businesses

forEveryone.residentsDescription: RideShift is built for all of Richmond — every neighborhood, every zip code. Sign up with just your email and start earning rewards for the way you already get around.
forEveryone.businessDescription: Turn Richmond commuters into your regulars. List a weekly deal, attract foot traffic, and show your community you're invested in a cleaner, smarter city.

trust.title: Built on Trust
trust.description: No GPS. No tracking. Just your word. RideShift trusts Richmond residents to report honestly — because civic programs work best when they lower barriers instead of raising them.

independence.note: RideShift runs independently — no city systems, no city budget, no city staff. Just Richmond residents and local businesses.

goal.subtitle: How will you commute this week? Add multiple modes.

checkin.title: Confirm Check-In
checkin.alreadyRespondedDescription: This check-in has already been recorded.
checkin.committed: You're one of {count} Richmond residents committed to a more sustainable city. Check your email for a thank you from one of our local business partners!
checkin.stillOnPath: You're still on the right path
checkin.goalsDirection: Goals set a direction — they're not a destination. You're one of {count} Richmond residents committed to a more sustainable city. Check your email for a thank you from one of our local business partners!

feedback.label: Was there anything that made meeting your goals difficult?
feedback.placeholder: Optional — share what got in the way

rewards.noRewards: No rewards available this week — check back soon!

history.title: Check-In History
history.empty: No check-ins yet — your first one arrives Sunday!

auth.goalConfirmed: Goal confirmed! Sign in to claim your rewards.
auth.magicLinkSent: We sent you a magic link. Click it to sign in.
auth.checkSpam: If you don't see it, check your spam folder.
